steps.title: Identify slope and intercept signs
steps.content: The points trend downward as $x$ increases — slope is negative, eliminating A and C. At $x = 0$, $y$ is around 8.5, not $0.8$. The slope is gentle (~$-0.8$), not steep (~$-8.5$).

steps.title: Match the form $y = b + mx$
steps.content:
$y$-intercept $\approx 8.5$, slope $\approx -0.8$:
$$y = 8.5 - 0.8x$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
